programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay visita el Pabellón Español en Nueva Jersey. Descubre que un par de hermanos en disputa están llevando el restaurante al suelo. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay llega a un restaurante endeudado propiedad de dos ex meseras y las cosas están tan mal que Ramsay realiza una intervención para abordar el tema del liderazgo.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: PJ's Steakhouse se está muriendo por la falta de control de la gerencia en la calidad de la comida, con un dueño un poco grosero y su esposo, el copropietario, sentados en el bar bebiendo todo el día.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay hace el viaje a Carlstadt, Nueva Jersey, para visitar Grasshopper Also, un restaurante que ha visto días mejores. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Viajando al North End de Boston, el chef Ramsay pasa una semana en Davide, un restaurante italiano mal administrado por hermanos enemistados. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay viaja a Providence, Rhode Island, para visitar DownCity, un restaurante con un avance detenido por un propietario obstinado y de mal genio. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Mientras está en Bridgeport, Connecticut, el chef Ramsay visita el Café Tavolini. Dos propietarios indiferentes observan cómo su restaurante se va a la ruina . Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay viaja a Sherman Oaks, California, para rescatar a un restaurante francés del peligro mientras los dueños, hermano y hermana, se pelean por el restaurante.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Durante su visita a Los Ángeles, el chef Ramsay se detiene en Capri. Este restaurante italiano está sucio, sirve comida terrible y está desordenado, todo gracias a un par de gemelos muy flojos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay viaja a Pasadena, California, para poner en forma un restaurante especializado en cocina caribeña. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Abajo, en Big Easy, el chef Ramsay intenta inyectar algo de vida en un restaurante sureño acosado por una decoración y menús atroces. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay regresa a algunos de los restaurantes para ver si siguieron su consejo. Los restaurantes que visita incluyen Mojito, The Junction y Bazzini. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay regresa a Lido di Manhattan, Anna Vincenzo's y Le Bistro para ver si los propietarios han implementado sus cambios. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: The Secret Garden" es un romántico restaurante francés que está al borde de la quiebra. El chef Ramsay causa revuelo cuando sugiere cambiar la decoración fea, el menú y la cocina sucia.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherhoods
programme.desc: Two men are murdered while sleeping in their beds. The next night, arson destroys a family planning clinic. Investigators wonder whether some shards of glass, paint chips and a chicken feather could link what appear to be two separate crimes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a popular gym teacher is found dead of what appears to be an accidental gunshot wound, his family is suspicious. A tape recorded by the victim just before his death tells the true story of his strange marriage and his wife's insatiable greed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Doctors are puzzled when a two-year-old boy is rushed to the hospital with brain seizures and breathing difficulties. Finally, the boy's sister provides an important clue, raising the possibility of a rare syndrome.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A three-year-old develops a respiratory condition. His father has Alzheimers. An investigator reveals that their ill health is due to mold in their modern home.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young TV news producer is raped and murdered in her apartment. Police identify two suspects, but both are cleared of any wrongdoing. When the case stalls for more than a year, investigators turn to the Commonwealth of Virginia's DNA Databank.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in a ravine, and crucial evidence has been washed away by severe thunderstorms. Twice, the trail turns cold. Almost 20 years later, an old hat and a chip of stainless steel brings the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Mark Fair left for work and his fiancée, Karla Brown, stayed home. Later, he found her dead. During the autopsy, bite marks on her body were re-examined and forensic odontology identified the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1997, Kelly Eckart's car was found, with her belongings still in it, after she worked a late shift in Franklin, Indiana. Days later, her body was found in an isolated ravine.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Flu-like symptoms of a mother and her children prove to be something more serious: thallium poisoning. After the mother's death, investigators turn their attention to finding the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It was one of the most brazen crimes of the 20th century. Adolph Coors III, chairman of the Coors Brewing Company, was kidnapped and held for ransom. The crime prompted one of the most intense manhunts in United States history.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When more than 700 Oregonians contracted food poisoning from a unique strain of salmonella in 1984, investigators uncovered a secret plot to influence local elections.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2007, Shamaia Smith disappears from a strip club in East Hartford, CT. Police consider various patrons of the club, but focus on local businessman Kenneth Otto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A retired police officer is found dead with a single gunshot wound to the head. His wife says the motive was robbery, but later tells police he committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1992, Laura Houghteling disappeared from her Bethesda home and was never seen again. Forensic scientists use evidence from her bedroom to direct police to a prime suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1999, 9-year-old Valiree Jackson vanished on her way to school near Spokane. Her father, Brad Jackson, reported the disappearance and the entire community started searching for her abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Women in a Louisiana city live in fear of a rapist who leaves no clues to his identity. But technology and behavioral science combine to give police a new forensic tool. Police narrow their search to one man: local policeman Randy Comeaux.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the body of a young woman is found under an isolated highway ramp, a unique fiber on the victim's clothing leads San Diego police straight to the most unlikely of killers.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman suddenly becomes critically ill, eventually leaving her unable to walk. A bone marrow test reveals the cause: arsenic poisoning. Investigators must determine if the poisoning was caused by groundwater contamination or something sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In rural Canada, Dr. John Schneeberger is accused of sedating and sexually assaulting one of his female patients and his step daughter. DNA tests demonstrate that the doctor is innocent, but the patient insists that he sedated and raped her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The woman was dead. The man had been shot four times and survived. When the man's version of events contradicted physical evidence, investigators turned to forensic science to paint a clearer picture of the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Witnesses saw a woman in the back of a truck, flailing her arms and screaming. When they found a jacket near a pool of blood, they knew what they had seen wasn't a joy ride.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A mother of two young children was found dead in her bedroom. Her death was ruled a suicide — but when investigators learned she had almost died in a house fire three years earlier, they decided to take another look at the evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police are dispatched to the scene of a shooting and discover the victim's husband is one of their own: a homicide detective who says his wife accidentally shot herself in the head.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police discover a bullet-riddled car, a missing driver and no witnesses. Had the victim been abducted or was she dead? The answers are found in a unique clue, so tiny it was measured in millionths of a meter.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman's death in Pennsylvania triggers a homicide investigation into another woman's death in North Carolina. Faced with striking similarities, examiners must determine if their suspect's story about accidental drowning is all wet.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 6-year-old girl ran and hid when she saw her grandmother being beaten to death, but the man followed, beat and assaulted her. She said the assailant was her uncle, who was later convicted. She recanted her testimony years later.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Janice Johnson was found dead at the foot of her basement stairs. Police in Nova Scotia had to unravel the circumstances surrounding Janice's death and answer the question: Was it an accident or murder?

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Rita and Zedd create an evil Blue Ranger from a high school art project.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: The Rangers and the Masked Rider team up to fight Count Dregon's warriors.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: The Rangers rush back to Earth to fight off an attack by Repelletor.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Rita's brother, Rito Revolto, promises to destroy the Power Rangers as a late wedding present for his sister.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: The Rangers search for the mythical sage Ninjor in an effort to restore their lost powers.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: The Rangers receive new Ninja Powers and new Zords to battle Rito Revolto in his attempt to destroy Angel Grove.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Rita and Lord Zedd unleash Vampirus against the Power Rangers' new Zords.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Based on Kimberly's dream, Rita Repulsa and Lord Zedd create Artistmole, a monster who steals the color out of life.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Rita and Zedd attempt to steal Adam's heirloom lantern for its power.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Rito and Zedd turn a science teacher into "Marvo the Meanie" as Rocky attempts to teach his class.

programme.desc: At a flea market, Chloe discovers a book of photos showcasing the romance of a young couple from the early seventies. She sets out on a literal and emotional journey to find the happy couple she knows only through photos.

programme.title: The Magic of Ordinary Days
programme.desc: Pregnant out of wedlock, an educated young woman is pressured by her father into an arranged marriage with a lonely farmer in this drama set during WWII. Stars Keri Russell and Skeet Ulrich.

programme.title: The Makeover
programme.desc: Hannah Higgins--a smart, driven Harvard-educated professor--attempts to turn blue-collar Boston beer vendor Elliot Doolittle into a viable candidate for Congress and inadvertently learns something of Elliot's side of life.

programme.title: The Flamingo Rising
programme.desc: An eccentric dreamer infuriates the owner of a funeral home when he decides to build the world's largest drive-in movie theater across the street. Star William Hurt, Elizabeth McGovern.

programme.title: Broadcasting Christmas
programme.desc: Two exes compete for the same co-host position at the nation's favorite morning show in Manhattan. They'll both do what it takes to get ahead, but the fire that burned between them hasn't quite burned out.

programme.title: Christmas Festival of Ice
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Emma sets out to save her town's beloved ice sculpture contest.

programme.title: Best Christmas Party Ever
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. A young party planner arranges a Christmas party for a New York toy store.

programme.title: Love Always, Santa
programme.desc: After losing her husband 3 years ago, Celia never thought she'd fall in love again. Now, her world revolves around taking care of her daughter Lilly. Lilly writes a letter to Santa with one wish, for her mom to find love again.

programme.title: Love at the Thanksgiving Day Parade
programme.desc: The annual Chicago Thanksgiving Day parade has to cut costs or it's going to be cancelled this year. When the city brings in consultant Henry Baldwin to analyze the books, he goes to toe to toe with parade manager Emily.

programme.title: Lucky Christmas
programme.desc: Holly Ceroni is devastated when she learns her winning lottery ticket is in her stolen car. But what happens when the man behind it falls for Holly? Stars Elizabeth Berkley and Jason Gray-Stanford.

programme.title: The Christmas Parade
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Haley, finds a renewed Christmas spirit and unexpected love.

programme.title: The Christmas Shepherd
programme.desc: Buddy, a German Shepherd born on Christmas Day, means the world to widowed children's author Sally Brown. When a thunderstorm causes Buddy to run away from home, he ends up being adopted by a single father and his daughter.

programme.title: A Dog Named Christmas
programme.desc: A developmentally-challenged young man is determined to prove to his family that he can care for a dog on his own. In his triumph, he inspires his father to love the new member of the family. Stars Bruce Greenwood, Linda Emond.

programme.title: Broadcasting Christmas
programme.desc: Two exes compete for the same co-host position at the nation's favorite morning show in Manhattan. They'll both do what it takes to get ahead, but the fire that burned between them hasn't quite burned out.

programme.title: Dos Para Ganar
programme.desc: Una instructora de esquí y un corredor encuentran el romance en la pista de nieve cuando él regresa a casa y se prepara para la carrera más importante de su vida.

programme.title: El Ingrediente Secreto
programme.desc: Kelly, una panadera de una pequeña ciudad recibe una gran sorpresa cuando es invitada a competir en un show de panaderos con motivo del Día de San Valentín en la ciudad de Nueva York.

programme.title: Intercambio Navideño
programme.desc: Dos hermanas gemelas que planean sus respectivas fiestas Navideñas sienten envidia de la vida de la otra. Protagonizada por Candace Cameron Bure y Mark Deklin.

programme.title: Navidad en Homestead
programme.desc: La vida da un vuelco para el guapo alcalde de Homestead cuando una película de Hollywood viene a grabar en plena temporada navideña. Protagonizan Taylor Cole y Michael Rady.

programme.title: Amor en la nieve
programme.desc: Una periodista está en búsqueda del trabajo de sus sueños, y termina asesorando a un apuesto propietario de un hotel B&B (Bed and breakfast) que quiere ser guía turístico.

programme.title: Amor en invierno
programme.desc: Ally, finalista de un programa de citas en televisión, debe regresar a su ciudad natal para una última cita con la persona menos esperada. Protagonizada por Italia Ricci, Chad Michael Murray, Jack Turner.

programme.title: Navidad en las Rocallosas
programme.desc: Sarah se dirige al emproblemado rancho de su tío para escapar de New York. De regreso a casa surgen complicaciones cuando Graham, una estrella de Hollywood, llega al rancho para prepararse para su próxima película.

programme.title: Navidad en el Hotel Plaza
programme.desc: Cuando la historiadora Jessica es contratada para crear la exhibición navideña de "El Plaza", descubre hechos importantes mientras trabaja en equipo con el guapo decorador Nick para darle vida a la exhibición.

programme.title: Suenan las campanas navideñas
programme.desc: Una fotógrafa independiente, de camino a Cape Cod para celebrar la boda de su padre en Nochebuena, le pide ayuda a un viejo amigo de la infancia para un evento navideño que podría impulsar su carrera.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley

programme.desc: Laverne pretends to be a woman with-child in order to help her pregnant friend win prizes in a contest for mothers-to-be.

programme.desc: While checking up on her new photographer boyfriend at a fashion show, Laverne creates chaos when she is mistaken for a model.

programme.desc: Laverne and the gang fearfully gather in an attempt to rid Laverne's apartment of an odd ghost that has suddenly taken up residence.

programme.desc: Squiggy and Lenny move into the girls' building, making them all neighbors.

programme.desc: Shirley talks Laverne into volunteering with her at the hospital.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: The girls have trouble fitting in at a bridal shower.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: The girls decide to start a new career in modeling.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Laverne gets arrested for stealing.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Shirley wins a honeymoon vacation in a fancy hotel and she and Laverne decide to take advantage of it. Carmine poses as Shirley's husband and they sneak Laverne in, but the hotel is intent on getting many publicity photos of the married couple.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: The girls conspire to get rid of Frank's girlfriend.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Laverne and Shirley want to buy a new couch and find out about a furniture sale in a house Shirley says is haunted. When they and Lenny and Squiggy go to buy the couch, they find out she may be right.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: The girls take up the odd job of selling house plants door to door, after getting laid off from Shotz. They run into an odd assortment of bizarre tenants who have varied reactions to their sales pitch.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: The girls work as temps to save for a cruise. They deal with a bratty boy, but they make it long enough to finally get aboard and say bon voyage. They discover Len and Squig have stowed away.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: The girls are happy to head out on their first plane trip ever, but their smiles are turned upside down when their pilot passes out. Leaving it up to one of them to take over the controls.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Kit asks Ty to help her re-home a horse that she was given. Lou resurrects the Hudson Derby as a fundraiser event to help Mrs. Bell and others with some county legal problems.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Spartan is stolen and turns up at a horse auction. He is bought by Wes, the man who tried to burn down Fleming's barn. Amy is determined to get Spartan back.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: After a traumatized Spartan refuses to jump, Amy takes him to a man who fixes horses and hearts. Meanwhile, Ty struggles to tame his new horse, Harley, on his own.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Ty and Amy make a trip up to the mountains. But when Ty passes out with a high fever and a blizzard approaches, their remote location is a problem.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: An accident on the highway involving a school bus and a trailer full of horses leads to sudden fame for Amy and a surge of business at Heartland.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Business is booming at Heartland. Amy finds herself caught in the middle of a family crisis when she tries to help a girl and her horse recover from what appears to be a freak accident.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Jack's truck is on its way to rust bucket heaven, forcing him to find the courage to say goodbye to a part of his past.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy and Ty spend the night in the haunted Hanley barn, trying to get to the bottom of a mystery.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Ty's apprenticeship with Scott Cardinal takes him to the Bailey ranch where Kit's mare is about to deliver. The idea of Ty and Kit spending time together makes Amy jealous.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: When Amy and Ty become the proud new parents of an orphaned foal, the strength of their relationship is put to the test.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: When Tim buys a racehorse from Lisa, he puts everything on the line, including Amy, to win big.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Ty protects his mother Lily from his abusive stepfather, who shows up at Heartland to win her back.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy is upset when Ty flies off with Scott to a remote veterinarian call on his last day before heading to school.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy leads a rescue search to find Ty and Scott. With Scott near death, Ty must help him survive.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día diez - Parte 1
programme.desc: Luego de una visita sorpresa de familiares, los concursantes restantes deberán diseñar sus propios restaurantes y jerarquías para el servicio final.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día diez - Parte 2
programme.desc: Desde el menú hasta la decoración, los dos finalistas deben demostrar su talento al chef Ramsay, ya que cada uno está a cargo de sus propios restaurantes.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El tiránico Chef Gordon Ramsay regresa por tercer verano para enseñar y torturar a posibles Chefs. El ganador recibirá un trabajo de Chef en el resort Green Valley Ranch de Nevada.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los dos equipos se enfrentan en un desafío de preparación de alimentos que recompensa a los ganadores por la oportunidad de pasar tiempo con el Chef Ramsay fuera de la cocina.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay ordena a los concursantes restantes que preparen el desayuno para los miembros del servicio visitantes. El equipo ganador tendrá tiempo libre y los perdedores tendrán el rol de patrullar la cocina.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En el cuarto día, los Chefs restantes compiten en una prueba de degustación con los ojos vendados. Los perdedores deben aceptar un castigo difícil mientras los ganadores cenan con el Chef Ramsay.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Para avanzar en este desafío, los siete Chefs restantes deben comprar y preparar la comida para la recepción de una boda.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Melissa se une a los hombres en una competencia para ver qué equipo puede preparar los mejores platos de langosta. Pero hay un problema: los equipos deben matar primero a sus crustáceos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los seis concursantes restantes deben preparar aperitivos y platos principales con las sobras, por lo que ambos equipos deben crear sus propios menús de cena.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay consolida a los cinco concursantes restantes en un equipo, pero primero deben competir entre sí para impresionar a 100 estudiantes de secundaria.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los tres Chefs restantes preparan versiones gourmet de platos estadounidenses clásicos para jueces externos: sus madres, que no saben qué platos están probando.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los dos últimos competidores se enfrentan a un desafío final que implica algo más que cocinar: deben diseñar y administrar sus propios restaurantes.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En el final de temporada, los ánimos se enfurecen cuando los dos concursantes preparan un último servicio de cena para el chef Ramsay.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Gordon Ramsay regresa para una cuarta temporada de torturas culinarias. Quince Chefs competirán por la oportunidad de trabajar en el propio restaurante de Ramsay en Los Ángeles.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El primer desafío de la temporada encuentra a los concursantes cortando a un rodaballo en finos filetes de 180 gramos. Un miembro de cada equipo debe actuar como camarero durante el servicio de comidas.

programme.desc: Larry tries to get information for the investigative team.

programme.desc: Larry and Balki compete on a television game show.

programme.desc: Mary Anne and Jennifer are the flight attendants for Balki's first plane trip.

programme.desc: Balki's trip to the optometrist causes trouble when he's needed as a substitute for the bowling team.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: Balki gets hypnotized and becomes convinced he's Elvis.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: Larry and Balki are put in jail after they refuse to reveal a source.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: Larry and Balki search for a used car.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: Lydia plans to marry a man who Larry and Balki believe is a gigolo.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: Larry comes up with a plan for Balki to win back the money he lost at Mr. Gorpley's poker game.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: Larry teaches a college journalism class, but his standards prove too high for his students.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: On his 25th birthday, Balki gets a surprise from home - a wife.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: Larry incurs the wrath of Myposians when he lies about his roller skating skills to impress Jennifer.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: After a minor car accident, Larry plans to defraud an insurance company to help his sister with her tuition.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: When Balki becomes editor of the office newsletter, Larry gives him advice on how to get the dirt.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: Balki's first trip to the dentist goes wild after Balki and Larry accidentally inhale too much laughing gas.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: Larry reports on a money laundering scheme - prompting the scheme's leader to command the office with a bomb.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: Larry and Balki find a secret compartment in the chimney containing clues to the works of a famous poet.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: Larry's father comes to visit, and everyone ends up trapped in the basement - as it fills with water.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: Larry and his father finally express their true feelings for each other while trapped in a flooding basement.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: The gang plays golf with Jennifer's father. Larry lets her father win, but Balki doesn't miss a shot.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: Despite her fear of cameras, Larry convinces Lydia to try out a talk show version of her advice column for TV.

programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes, sightseeing in Paris, are sitting at a sidewalk cafe that Charles Boyer is known to frequent. Lucy thinks she has spotted Boyer and turns to jelly, but Ricky convinces her it's a case of mistaken identity.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy goes on a hunger strike in order to get Ricky to buy an expensive dress from a famous French designer. He finally gives in but returns the dress when he discovers that Ethel smuggled her food while on the strike.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Fred, managing Ricky's band while on European tour, routes the musicians to Locarno instead of Lucerne. Ricky is distraught and Lucy suggests a hike in the Alps with the Mertzes to take his mind off his problems.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Fred Mertz, managing Ricky's European band tour, is very concerned over the expense incurred when he misrouted Ricky's band so he books second-class train passage for the overnight trip to Florence and a fourth-class hotel for their stay.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes are on a train for Rome when Lucy is 'discovered' by an Italian film director who offers her a role in his new picture, "Bitter Grapes".

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes are leaving Genoa for Nice when Lucy decides they should all go by bicycle because they can't see enough of the countries from the train. Ricky and the Mertzes agree under protest and after an exhausting day of pedaling.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky is working in Monte Carlo, but Fred goofed and bargained for too little money for the engagement. Lucy and Ethel go to the casino to watch, but when Lucy finds a chip that someone dropped and replaces it on the table, it wins and continues to do so.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes need to return to the United States by plane instead of ship creating problems for Lucy who has bought, among other souvenirs, a 30-pound cheese.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky is opening a new night spot, the Club Babalu, and wants Bob Hope to appear at the grand opening. Lucy fears Hope won't because of her widespread reputation for causing chaos, and wants to reassure him that this time she's butting out.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Although they both agree not to try and influence Little Ricky's future, Lucy buys a toy doctor kit and Ricky gives him a drum set. Their son takes to the drums and begins to play it non-stop for days.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Orson Welles is scheduled to perform for a benefit in Ricky's club. Ricky is worried that Lucy will foul things up if she is around so he decides to send her off to Florida.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Little Ricky is scheduled to play the drums in his first music school recital. Although his parents and the Mertzes are overcome with nervousness, Little Ricky seems calm until his big moment arrives, then goes to pieces.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Mario, the Ricardos' and Mertzes' gondolier in Venice, comes to New York to surprise his brother, but turns up at the Ricardos' apartment when he can't find him.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy has misplaced her and Ethel's train tickets to Florida and they must share a ride with strange Mrs. Grundy. Mrs Grundy's odd behavior becomes more troubling to Lucy and Ethel when they learn that an escaped hatchet murderess matches her description.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: While on vacation in Florida, Lucy and Ethel go on a shopping spree and spend a whopping $140! To make sure that their wives don't repeat their spree Ricky and Fred take the ladies on their next fishing trip.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky and Fred are scheduled to judge a beauty contest but Lucy and Ethel plan for them to miss it. The four go out on a little cruise before the contest and Lucy has arranged for the boat's gas tank to be only half-filled.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky and Fred are scheduled to judge a beauty contest but Lucy and Ethel plan for them to miss it. The four go out on a little cruise before the contest and Lucy has arranged for the boat's gas tank to be only half-filled.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and the Mertzes are cast in Little Ricky's school play when it runs short of cast members. Ricky plays a hollow tree, Lucy is the wicked witch, Fred plays the friendly frog, and Ethel is transformed in to the fairy princess.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky insults Lucy's taste in hats so, as a joke, Lucy puts a loving cap trophy on her head that Ricky plans to present to champion jockey Johnny Longden at a National Turf Association dinner later that night. The trophy gets stuck on Lucy's head.

programme.title: Movin' On
programme.desc: On Christmas Day, Sonny and Will race to find a necklace.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: A deadly accident at a naval base exposes a unit of Seabees to a super virus and leaves the rest of the base and the city of New Orleans at risk for an outbreak; Wade is infected with the virus and given hours to live.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: Lasalle must investigate his former partner in the Vice unit after the NCIS team finds a link between an international drug ring and the New Orleans Police Department; Rita looks into a connection between the mayor and illegal activity in Clearwater.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Jamie and Joe search for an undocumented teenage girl who has been sex-trafficked; a woman in witness protection is murdered; Frank calls out the district attorney's office for instituting a new rule that classifies armed robbery as a misdemeanor.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: The family argues over Danny's questionable tactics as he searches for a missing girl; Jamie starts his new life as a cop.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: A good Samaritan with a police record takes action against a terrorizing subway criminal, forcing the Reagans to weigh the rights and wrongs of vigilantism.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Danny, Erin and Frank work together to seek justice when the main suspect in a rape case is protected by diplomatic immunity.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: When an off-duty police officer is killed during a diamond heist, the entire NYPD searches for the person responsible.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: The Reagans argue the advantages and disadvantages of profiling; Danny, Frank and the rest of the NYPD search for a homemade bomb about to detonate.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Three teenagers die from drug overdose, and Danny sets out to find their narcotic source and bring the responsible to justice.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: The family questions Erin's tactics when she tries to take down a gang leader by using his law-abiding brother as bait.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: After witnessing a crime in progress, Jamie pursues a suspect; Danny has to help Jamie avoid an internal affairs investigation.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Erin becomes the subject of a personal and deadly vendetta when a reviled rapist and murderer she put away is released from jail.

programme.desc: Actor Joe Manganiello joins as a guest judge in a semi-nude Flash Challenge, and rivalries flare as the artists struggle through a pinup Elimination Tattoo.

programme.title: Ink Master

programme.title: Ink Master

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Después de una serie de robos violentos a bancos y asesinatos en el sur de Miami a mediados de los 80, el FBI se embarcó en una investigación exhaustiva de ocho meses.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: A inicios del verano de 1990, empezaron a aparecer cuerpos de varias mujeres dentro y en los alrededores de la ciudad de Viena, Austria.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: El 20 de agosto de 1980, un francotirador invisible asesinó a dos hombres negros jóvenes mientras trotaban con dos mujeres blancas en Salt Lake City, Utah.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Chevie y Cheyne Kejoe ganaron la atención nacional después de la grabación de un tiroteo en una cinta con oficiales estatales y locales en Wilmington, Ohio, el 15 de febrero de 1997.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En abril de 1995, en Washington D. C., dos oficiales recibieron disparos y uno de ellos fue asesinado. Cada uno había estado sentado en sus patrullas cuando un hombre se acercó sigilosamente y abrió fuego.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Las tensiones raciales en Búfalo durante 1980 estaban en su punto máximo todo el tiempo. Seis hombres negros habían sido asesinados de manera violenta: a dos de ellos les habían arrancado el corazón.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: El 3 de febrero de 1990, una niña huyó de la casa de su madre y desapareció sin dejar rastro. Su madre esperaba que la policía de Pasadena, en Texas, pudiera encontrarla antes de que fuera muy tarde.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer en Delaware desapareció en 1996, sus amigos y su familia descubrieron su vida secreta. La secretaria del gobernador había tenido un amorío ilícito con un hombre casado y acaudalado.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: A principios de los 90, la policía de Washington D. C. estaba perdiendo la batalla contra las bandas callejeras que habían fortalecido sus territorios con gran violencia.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En junio del 1992, unos bandidos enmascarados llevaron a cabo un robo audaz durante el mediodía. Esto marcó el comienzo de una ola de crimen que sacudió Seattle.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Cuando la policía en una pequeña comunidad del estado de Washington comenzó a investigar la desaparición de una mujer de 22 años, no tenían manera de saber que se transformaría en una persecución a nivel nacional de un sádico sexual.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Un extraño secuestró a una niña de ocho años mientras jugaba en el vecindario de Tucson, Arizona. Solo dejó atrás una bicicleta y a una madre desesperada.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En una fría tarde de 1989, la capitana de la Marina Shirley Russel desapareció de Quantico, Virginia. La capitana Russel era una oficial dedicada; sus amigos y colegas estaban seguros de que no se había ausentado sin permiso.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En febrero de 1996, el millonario de Nueva Jersey Frank Black viajó a Florida para cerrar un trato de negocios importante antes de su retiro.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Flint visits relatives in a seaside community, but when he discovers the town is actually a Cobra base and its residents are mind-controlled, the vacation is over! It's time for action, and reinforcements are on the way in the W.H.A.L.E. and AWE Striker!

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: When Dusty and Footloose jump with their Mauler tank from a damaged Joe cargo plane, they find themselves in the middle of the desert. They also find themselves in the middle of a tank-on-tank battle with Cobra's latest weapon: The plasma cannon!

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra attempts to create amphibious soldiers capable of breathing on land and sea. But when the experiment fails and the beautiful test subject Mara can only survive underwater, Cobra hunts her down to determine what went wrong.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 1 of 2. When Dusty needs money to care for his ailing mother, he unknowingly accepts help from Cobra agents. Finding that sensitive information has been leaked to the enemy, the Joe team begins to suspect the young recruit of betrayal.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 2 of 2. A member of the G.I. Joe team has defected to Cobra, and the stakes are high. Sensitive information is now in Cobra hands, with Dusty among their ranks. The Joes have to battle Cobra - and their former friend - in a full on assault!

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: The Joe team is placed under the command of Watchdog, the ultimate military computer purchased by the Pentagon to wipe out the forces of terrorism and Cobra. The only problem, thanks to the enemy programming, is that it may be a double agent.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: When Cobra hijacks a network of communication satellites, the Joes must launch their first space mission. Members undergo an arduous training program to select potential astronauts, resulting in a fierce competition to become the first Joe in space.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: When a suspected invasion from outer space threatens the planet, the Joes are forced to team up with their Russian counterparts, the Oktober Guard. But as the two teams struggle to contain the threat, they discover more than they bargained for.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: A mission to rescue an archeologist from Cobra's clutches leads Duke, Alpine, Barbecue and Bazooka on a strange supernatural journey through the tunnels of a pharaoh's tomb, where they have a confrontation with Osiris, the Egyptian god of the dead!

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra steals specimens of a recently discovered dinosaur DNA, and through a sinister scientific process grows its own giant reptiles to battle Joe and bring terror to the world! Gung Ho, Roadblock, and the others must confront these Jurassic beasts.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: A nearly-bankrupt Cobra makes a desperate attempt to stay afloat, disguising Zartan and the Dreadnoks as a new heavy metal band called Cold Slither. Unfortunately, their subliminal mind-control music is a big hit!

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 1 of 2. After a battle with Cobra a, Shipwreck is wounded and wakes up in the quaint town of Springfield. The battle actually took place years ago, and Springfield is now his home with his wife Mara, but something doesn't feel right.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 2 of 2. Shipwreck discovers he's living in a Cobra nightmare! Not only is he stuck in a town completely under Cobra control, but the town sits atop its largest base of operations… and the entire population of both is looking for him!

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: When a surprise attack by Cobra reveals that the Joes have gotten sloppy, General Hawk enlists Sergeant Slaughter to whip the team back into shape. Meanwhile, Dr. Mindbender plots to build a new Cobra leader from the DNA of famous historic conquerors.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: The Joes send teams across the world to prevent Dr. Mindbender from obtaining the DNA of famous and ruthless conquerors. While guarding the tomb of Ivan the terrible, Duke's team and the Oktober Guard struggle to fend off an attack by Cobra's BATs.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Dr. Mindbender continues his mission to collect the DNA of ancient conquerors. After Sergeant Slaughter retrieves a DNA pack from Cobra's raid on Sun Tzu's tomb, the Joes suspect that Cobra is building a new breed of soldiers and set out to stop them.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: The Joes invade Cobra Island to rescue one of their own and discover Cobra's master plan for the DNA they've been gathering: to create a Cobra Emperor called Serpentor.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: While the Joes are on a rescue mission at Cobra Island, Serpentor launches a full-scale assault on Washington D.C. With no time to lose, the Joes must work quickly to stop the Cobra Emperor before the whole world is doomed.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: When Cobra threatens to destroy the US coastline with a giant vortex, Lady Jaye goes on an undercover mission to learn more about the Cobra weapon that can create destructive whirlpools and tidal waves.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: After a space probe containing anti-matter crashes into the ocean, the Joes race to retrieve the probe before Cobra finds out about it, but Zarana is already on a mission of her own to sabotage their operation.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: While at the decommissioning ceremony for the battleship U.S.S. Montana, G.I. Joe comes under attack by Cobra and the ship's former captain, Admiral Lattimer, who is unwilling to see his aged vessel get scrapped.

programme.title: Igor

programme.title: The Care Bears Movie
programme.desc: The Care Bears leave their cloud home in Care-A-Lot to try to teach earthlings how to share their feelings of love and caring for each other.

programme.title: Charlotte's Web
programme.desc: A tiny spider spins a great tale of friendship and adventure in this dazzling film version of E.B. White's beloved children's book.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Nya digitizes Jay and uploads him into Zane’s mind. Jay reviews memories of the Ninja’s various motorcycles, mechs and planes in order to solve the vehicle-themed puzzle.

programme.title: LEGO Marvel Avengers: Climate Conundrum (Special)
programme.desc: When AIM sabotages world saving technology at a climate conference, Iron Man and Hulk must save the scientists from their very own inventions.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Cole joins Jay and Zane inside the Nindroid to solve a mysterious puzzle by revisiting some of Ninjago’s distinctive destinations.

programme.title: LEGO Marvel Avengers: Climate Conundrum (Special)
programme.desc: When AIM steals Tony Stark's powerful new Weather Machine, it's Black Widow and Hawkeye to the rescue, taking off on a high-tech, high-speed chase through New York City!

programme.title: LEGO Marvel Avengers: Climate Conundrum (Special)
programme.desc: With the worlds' weather out-of-control, the Avengers trek across the globe to confront the forces of AIM and shut down Tony Stark's hijacked Weather Towers.

programme.title: LEGO Marvel Avengers: Climate Conundrum (Special)
programme.desc: Hulk, Black Widow and Hawkeye must protect New York City while Iron Man, Captain America and Justin Hammer journey deep into the ocean to stop Red Skull from using Tony's Weather Machine to destroy the world.

programme.title: Marvel Superheroes - Black Panther - Trouble in Wakanda
programme.desc: Ulysses Klaue and Eric Killmonger are back to loot Wakanda's Vibranium mines, this time with the help of the evil Titan Thanos. Will Black Panther be successful in stopping their evil plot, even with the help of Earth's Mightiest Heroes?

programme.title: Marvel Superheroes - Guardians of the Galaxy - The Thanos Threat
programme.desc: When Thanos, Ronan, Nebula and the Marauders yearn to possess the Building Stone — a powerful and creative relic — the fate of the universe depends on the Guardians of the Galaxy to protect it.

programme.title: LEGO Marvel: Avengers Reassembled
programme.desc: The Avengers are forced to "party" with Ultron when he seeks to disassemble the team by taking control of Iron Man's armor and enacting a nefarious scheme to take over the world.

programme.title: Marvel Superheroes - LEGO Spiderman: Vexed by Venom
programme.desc: Thanks to Green Goblin and Venom, tech theft is now at an all-time high, can our Friendly Neighborhood Spider-Man put an end to their mysterious villainous scheme before all of New York City is destroyed?

programme.title: LEGO DC Super Heroes: Batman Be-Leaguered
programme.desc: Superman wants Batman to join his new superhero team, but Batman prides himself on being a self-sufficient loner.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Kai confronts his dad for aiding the Hands of Time, only to discover that his parents are actually Acronix and Krux's captives.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Hands of Time blackmail Kai and Nya into using their combined Elemental powers to retrieve the fourth and final Time Blade from the Boiling Sea with the promise that the siblings can use its reversal power to save the quickly-fading Master Wu.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Kai and Nya stow away aboard Krux and Acronix’s time-traveling snake mech in a desperate attempt to save Master Wu. But when they arrive in the past, they must help the Elemental Masters prevent the Hands of Time from re-writing Ninjago history.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When an unknown criminal syndicate threatens the Royal Family, the Ninja are called back into action and must protect the royal princess and a fabled artifact that may hold supernatural powers.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: In the wake of a vicious attack upon the palace, the Sons of Garmadon steal the second Oni Mask, and the ninja invite the royal princess, Harumi, into their makeshift family.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: While Princess Harumi adjusts to life with the ninja, Lloyd and Jay search for answers about the Oni Masks, while Cole and Zane attempt to infiltrate the Sons of Garmadon.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: In order to join the Sons of Garmadon, Zane (aka Snake Jaguar) participates in a deadly motorcycle initiation race.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Zane’s near demise at the hands of Mr. E forces the ninja to flee aboard the Bounty, where they discover that a transmission Zane intercepted may reveal the hidden location of the Quiet One.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: As Lloyd and Harumi venture deep into Primeval’s Eye in search of the third Oni Mask, the ninja attempt to fix the Bounty and make a startling discovery.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: As Lloyd and Harumi search the Oni Temple for the last mask, the ninja are taken hostage and discover Princess Harumi’s true intentions.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja appeal to the police commissioner of Ninjago in an effort to help save Lloyd and thwart Harumi’s efforts to resurrect the evil Lord Garmadon.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Just when the Ninja think they have saved the day, Lord Garmadon returns to NINJAGO, and frees Harumi, who encourages him to “achieve his true potential” by conquering the one thing that has always stood in his way… his son, Lloyd.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja race to save Lloyd, as a more powerful-than-ever Lord Garmadon creates an enormous Colossi to help him rule NINJAGO and defeat the ninja.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Ninjago has become a bleak, enemy-occupied city ruled by Emperor Garmadon and his Sons of Garmadon biker gang.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Jay, Kai and Zane are interrogated by Iron Baron, the ruthless warlord to the Dragon Hunters. Feeling threatened, the Ninja choose to keep their identities secret.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: As the Ninja are put into a cage aboard a hunting party, they learn that their elemental powers will be used to help lure a dragon. Undercover, Cole learns Iron Baron is in search for Firstbourne’s nest – the Mother of All Dragons.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After a flashback of when Jay first meets Master Wu, Jay awakens to find he’s still with his caged friends returning from their hunting party. Forced into slave labor, Jay’s inspired by his dream of his master when Wu told him to ‘build the impossible’.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Dareth warns his friends just as the Sons of Garmadon ambush their secret headquarters. The Elemental Masters are each captured, except for Lloyd, Nya, Dareth and Skylor, who escape within Nya’s escape vehicle.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: As Lloyd and his friends lick their wounds, Mystake shares how she managed to escape the Sons of Garmadon earlier -- she’s a shape-shifting Oni.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: In the wastelands, Faith teaches the Ninja how to master their chain rifles and they hunt a dragon. As teen Wu struggles, Kai encourages him to not give up in a lesson of confidence.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El noruego busca crear un vínculo de nuevo con su hijo Olaf por medio de un regalo, mientras que el Abuelo, Johnatan, Peluzín y todo el edificio están vueltos locos con los álbumes de estampitas del mundial 2018.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego cansado de que todo mundo lo busque solo por su dinero busca a Pitipú para que le ayude a idear un plan, mientras que Peluzín se embarca en el mundo de la robótica.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Ortega se va unos días a vivir con Jonathan y esto crea un conflicto con Olaf, mientras Irmita espera la visita de su prima a quien le esconde un gran secreto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El edificio Pino es desalojado por causas de fuerza mayor y todos tienen que buscar donde vivir, mientras que el Abuelo se deja caer en una espiral descendente debido a su gran ego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está despilfarrando su fortuna peor que nunca, mientras que Pitipú, Don Sebas y Gaspar buscan solucionar el problema de plomería del edificio Pino.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego busca desesperadamente una forma para recuperar su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo se hace adicto al videojuego de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego todavía no puede asimilar que perdió toda su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo malaconseja a Peluzín de cómo pagar la renta atrasada de su departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Irma organiza un club de peleas clandestinas, mientras que Pitipú decepcionado de sus conocimientos Bíblicos, decide embarcarse en el camino del mal.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú busca ayudar a Don Sebas con su problema de peso, mientras que Peluzín y el Noruego buscan aprovecharse de un afamado cantante del edificio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño virus se empieza a propagar, infectando a todos en el edificio, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan buscan revivir a Irmita después de que Peluzín la deja en coma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El colegio organiza un viaje todo pagado a Acapulco para reforzar la relación "Padres e Hijos", y todos buscan colarse a esa vacación, así tengan hijos o no. Al final la vacación no resulta como esperaban.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego descubre por accidente que cuenta con poderes mentales y decide aprovecharlos para su conveniencia, mientras que el Diablo sube del inframundo para buscar un nuevo asistente en Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y es llevado de emergencia al hospital pero no es posible la operación. Deciden esperar a que se cure solo, llevándose una sorpresa. Mientras tanto, Olaf decide pedirle ayuda escolar a Jonathan y termina por aprovecharse.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está cansado de la mala racha que ha tenido con las mujeres y busca el consejo de Pitipú, mientras que Peluzín le pide ayuda a Jonathan para poder encontrar a su verdadero padre.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Mientras que el Abuelo está vuelto loco por encontrar su revista favorita, Peluzín desentierra la verdad sobre su verdadera familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Olaf se lleva una sorpresa muy desagradable al estar instalando su altar de muertos, mientras que el Abuelo se burla de Gaspar frente a toda su oficina lo que ocasiona una guerra entre ambos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín trata de averiguar el paradero de su madre con la ayuda de sus dos nuevos papás, mientras que Gaspar invita al Abuelo, el Noruego y Johnny a el nuevo restaurante de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y Peluzín buscan lucran aprovechando el próximo paro de agua en la ciudad, mientras que el Noruego nos revela por fin después de tanto tiempo el porque de su miedo al baño.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los Lambreton son los encargados de organizar la fiesta navideña de este año en su casa, mientras que Don Sebas extraña a su país natal y piensa en regresar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo despierta la curiosidad en el Noruego por conocer a su padre y este le pide ayuda a Gaspar para que lo acompañe en esta misión que ha hecho como su única prioridad. Mientras tanto el Abuelo encamina a Jonathan en su despertar sexual.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Viendo la tele en la sala de su casa de repente el Abuelo y el Noruego son golpeados con una nueva idea para lucrar en un popular programa de TV. Mientras tanto Peluzín se aventaja de un descuido de Gaspar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y mientras esta al filo de la muerte revalora su vida desde sus inicios recordando una parte de su infancia, la que busca esclarecer una vez recuperada su salud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa de manera inesperada con su Némesis de la infancia y junto con Gaspar se embarca en una cruzada para recuperar un objeto muy preciado de manos de su archienemigo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Este capitulo completo es una sátira de la típica historia de telenovelas que ha puesto a México en el mapa como el mas su fuerte exponente, sin reflejar necesariamente algún estándar de calidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe una visita inesperada con una noticia que le cambiara la vida. Mientras tanto Jonathan le ayuda a Peluzín para prepararse para una prueba muy importante.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una aparición religiosa se manifiesta en el baño del departamento y poco tardan el noruego y el abuelo en encontrarle una ventaja a esta situación.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo encuentra la manera de aprovecharse del sistema de seguros a costa de Peluzín. Mientras Gaspar les encarga al Noruego y a Jonathan que recojan en el aeropuerto a un familiar que viene de visita de los Estados Unidos.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: An international soccer game is taking place in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil and Lupin has his eyes on the box office and betting takes. Will the box office heist go as planned?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: An old man who supposedly knows the secret to Hitler's legacy lives in East Germany within the Berlin Wall. Lupin and his gang track the old man down, but the old man can't recall anything about any legacy.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: At Loch Ness in Scotland, the mysterious monster Nessie reveals itself from the lake, charmed by Fujiko's singing. Seeing this, Doctor Oz decides to use Fujiko to capture Nessie for his personal gain.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko and a mystery man have an enticing job for Lupin: Stealing a ton of gold bullion from a Swiss Bank, a bank renowned for its tight security. Can it be done? What is the mystery man's true identity?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A man is threatening to destroy the Leaning Tower of Pisa with a device that generates artificial earthquakes. The Italian government has no choice but to meet the culprit's, but Lupin takes the ransom for himself!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has stolen the golden death mask of Tutankhamen, the ancient Egyptian pharaoh known as the "boy king." However, when Lupin tries on the golden death mask he becomes possessed by an ominous curse.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Trans Europe Superexpress train has departed Venice and is headed to France. Onboard the Superexpress is crime boss Don Marcino's ill-gotten treasures. Can Lupin and his gang pull off the heist before the train reaches its destination?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin meets the grandson of master Ukiyoe artist, Toushusai Sharaku and learns that he has been switching his own works with his grandfather's originals. Unable to switch the last painting due to illness, he asks Lupin to switch it in his stead.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Fujiko have been invited to a party hosted by Marcel Dulane, a member of Paris' high society. However, the elegant party turns out to be a trap. Fujiko is taken hostage and Lupin, with a time-bomb belt strapped to his waist…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is in Monaco to race his new toy in the Monaco Grand Prix. Or so he thought. Lupin ends up losing both his money and race car in a fixed poker game at the casino.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A rare bottle of Bordeaux, commissioned by Napoleon for his beloved wife, Josephine, is to be given to the President of the United States as a Christmas present.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A criminal gang has hidden a microfilm containing the manufacturing process for artificial diamonds, developed by NASA, in one of Inspector Zenigata's molars. Determined to get his hands on that microfilm, Lupin must capture Inspector Zenigata.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Forward Hees, the world's richest man, suddenly dies a mysterious death and leaves a large ruby to Fujiko in his will. After inheriting the ruby, Fujiko comes down with the same mysterious fever as Hees…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A Count challenges Lupin to steal a gemstone named Dracula's Tear from on board his airship, the Hendenburg. However, also on board the ship are several formidable detectives: Homes III, Detective Archer, Koojisuke Kaneda and Inspector Zenigata.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is suffering from Transformation Sickness, an illness that transforms him into a cruel, cold-blooded criminal at the stroke of midnight, and leaves him with no recollection of his murderous crime spree in the morning…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A small Arab nation has received a blackmail notice. Pay a $100 million or have their oil fields blown up. Lupin targets the money, but his plans are hindered when he finds out the culprits are using human bombs.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Black Panther, the world's largest emerald, gets its name from the black panther that appears inside it when a light shines on it at a particular angle. After capturing this one-of-a-kind emerald, Lupin hides it in a museum to retrieve it later…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Vault maker Marukin Safe Company is forced into bankruptcy after Lupin cracks open their impenetrable safes. To test his own skills, Marukin's son challenges Lupin to open a safe he has designed…

programme.desc: Los bebés deben ayudar a Angélica a vender en su puesto de limonada, pero ella se niega a pagarles, y Susie aconseja que hagan una huelga. Carlitos y Fili se ponen vestidos para ver cómo se siente y descubren que son más frescos que los pantalones.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los bebés visitan una feria medieval tras ser hechizados con un cuento del Abuelo. El sentido del olfato de Carlitos mejora tras visitar al médico y hacer un tratamiento especial y ahora se siente libre.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlos decide que Carlitos debe usar el inodoro, así que él y los bebés entrenan a Firulais para que también lo use. Angélica toma crédito por el arte abstracto de los Rugrats y empieza ser considerada como una artista extraordinaria.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los bebés confunden la niebla por nubes. Cynthia cae al agua durante un viaje en barco.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los bebés quieren deshacerse del fantasma que creen que vive en el colchón del abuelo. Por otro lado, la minivan de Carlota deja de funcionar mientras lleva a los bebés al concierto de los Dummi Bears.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: A Tommy le da hipo, y Angélica y sus amigos se ofrecen a asustarlo para que se le quite. Llega el otoño y los Rugrats creen que los árboles están enfermos ya que ven que las hojas se caen y cambian de color. Tommy encabeza una campaña para curarlos.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Angélica quiere conseguir dulces y finge que su muñeca Cynthia fue secuestrada e incluso envía notas falsas de rescate. Los bebés intentan ayudar a una tortuga para que se encuentre con su padre.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Angélica ordena comida de un restaurante. Los Pickles preparan una foto para su tarjeta de Navidad.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Una picada de mosquito afecta a Angélica y se le hincha la nariz. Los bebés conspiran contra un técnico de reparación.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los bebés creen que el Abuelo se comió un insecto e intentan darle remedios. El Abuelo lleva a los Rugrats a un juego de bingo. El abuelo menciona que la Señorita Suerte no lo acompañó y los bebés piensan que se trata de una mujer.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlos se enamora de una oficial de tránsito y por algo que dice Angélica, Carlitos tiene miedo de ir preso cuando rompe los lentes de su padre. El hermano de Didi y su esposa están pensando en tener un bebé, así que deciden cuidan a los Rugrats.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlitos se enamora de Emma, una niña que juega sola en el parque. El único problema es que es la hermanita de un niño sobreprotector, muy grande, de tres años. Los Rugrats van a una pizzería e intentan recuperar unos boletos que Angélica ganó.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Tommy es confundido con un bebé problemático. Una partida de póquer en casa de la tía Miriam.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony explores Russian- and Korean-influenced cuisine in Manchurian winter.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony gets to know the food, drink and people of the Hudson River Valley.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
